user.title: Frigate Notify Bridge Setup

frigate_setup.title: Frigate Connection
frigate_setup.description:
Configure your Frigate NVR connection.

Existing Frigate URL: {frigate_url}

mqtt.title: MQTT Configuration
mqtt.description: Configure the MQTT broker connection for Frigate events.

push_provider.title: Push Notification Provider
push_provider.description: Choose how to deliver push notifications to mobile devices.

fcm.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging Setup
fcm.description: Choose how to configure Firebase Cloud Messaging.

fcm_google_sign_in.title: Sign in with Google

fcm_wait_for_oauth.title: Waiting for Sign-In
fcm_wait_for_oauth.description: Complete the Google sign-in in the other tab...

fcm_pick_project.title: Choose Firebase Project
fcm_pick_project.description: Select an existing Firebase project to reuse, or create a new one.

fcm_configure_project.title: Setting Up Firebase
fcm_configure_project.description: Creating your Firebase project and configuring push notifications. This may take up to a minute...

fcm_configure_failed.title: Firebase Setup Failed
fcm_configure_failed.description:
Setup failed: {error_detail}

You can retry or switch to manual setup.

data.action: What would you like to do?

ntfy.title: ntfy Setup
ntfy.description: Configure ntfy for push notifications. You can use the public ntfy.sh server or your own self-hosted instance.

pushover.title: Pushover Setup
pushover.description: Enter your Pushover credentials. You can find these in your Pushover dashboard.

relay.title: Push Relay Setup
relay.description: The push relay securely forwards notifications from your bridge to the Frigate Mobile app. A unique bridge ID, secret, and end-to-end encryption key have been generated for you — you do not need to change these unless you know what you are doing.

progress.wait_for_oauth: Waiting for Google sign-in to complete...
progress.configuring_firebase: Creating Firebase project and configuring push notifications...

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Frigate server
error.auth_code_required: Authorization code is missing. Please try again.
error.invalid_auth_code: Invalid or expired authorization code. Please try again.
error.fcm_create_project_permission_denied: Your Google account does not have permission to create projects. Check your GCP organization policies.
error.fcm_add_firebase_permission_denied: Your Google account does not have permission to add Firebase to this project.
error.fcm_enable_api_permission_denied: Your Google account does not have permission to enable APIs on this project.
error.fcm_create_sa_permission_denied: Your Google account does not have permission to create service accounts.
error.fcm_create_key_permission_denied: Your Google account does not have permission to create service account keys.
error.fcm_quota_exceeded: Google Cloud rate limit reached. Please wait a few minutes and retry.
error.fcm_server_error: Google Cloud returned a server error. Please retry in a few minutes.
error.fcm_operation_timeout: The operation timed out waiting for Google Cloud. Please retry.
error.fcm_network_error: Could not reach Google Cloud. Check your network connection and retry.
error.fcm_create_project_failed: Failed to create GCP project. Check logs for details.
error.fcm_add_firebase_failed: Failed to add Firebase to the project. Check logs for details.
error.fcm_enable_api_failed: Failed to enable required APIs. Check logs for details.
error.fcm_create_sa_failed: Failed to create the service account. Check logs for details.
error.fcm_create_key_failed: Failed to create the service account key. Check logs for details.
error.fcm_configure_unknown: An unexpected error occurred during Firebase setup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Frigate Notify Bridge is allowed
abort.oauth_failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again or use manual setup.
abort.oauth_denied: Access was denied. Please try again and grant the requested permissions.
abort.oauth_token_failed: Failed to exchange authorization code for access token. Please try again.
abort.firebase_list_failed: Could not retrieve Firebase projects. Verify your Google account has Firebase access.
abort.no_firebase_projects: No Firebase projects found. Create one at console.firebase.google.com first.

connection_settings.title: Connection Settings
connection_settings.description: Configure the Frigate URL and home WiFi networks for local/remote switching.

device_management.title: Manage Paired Devices
device_management.description: You have {device_count} paired device(s). Select devices to remove.
